title: Rhamnales
content: The Rhamnales are an order of dicotyledon plant s in the subclass Rosidae. In the Cronquist system, the following families were placed here: "Leea" may be included within the Vitaceae. The Rhamnaceae are no longer considered close relatives of these other forms, and newer systems move them to the Rosales. The order then becomes the Vitales. Under the APG III system of classification, Rhamnales is not recognized. Instead, the families previously included here under the Cronquist system are included under the following orders:
